---
title: "Testing Vignette"
author: Lori Shepherd
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
vignette: >
    %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
    %\VignetteIndexEntry{Testing Vignette}
    %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE)
```

# Overview

Add something

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
